title: This Keyword
desc: Context binding with call, apply, bind
solution:
const user = { name: 'Bob', greet() { return 'Hi, ' + this.name; }};
const greetFn = user.greet.bind(user);

title: DOM Basics
starterCode: // Change #title text to 'Hello DOM'
solution:
const title = document.querySelector('#title');
title.textContent = 'Hello DOM';

title: Events
starterCode: // On #btn click, alert 'Button clicked!'
solution:
const btn = document.querySelector('#btn');
btn.addEventListener('click', () => alert('Button clicked!'));

title: Array Methods
starterCode: // From [1,2,3,4,5]: filter evens, double them. Result: [4,8]
solution:
const nums = [1,2,3,4,5];
const result = nums.filter(n => n % 2 === 0).map(n => n * 2);

title: String Methods
starterCode: // Convert 'hello-world' to 'hello world'
solution:
const str = 'hello-world';
const result = str.split('-').join(' ');

title: Numbers & Math
starterCode: // Random integer 1-10 inclusive
solution: const random = Math.floor(Math.random() * 10) + 1;

title: Date & Time
starterCode: // Store current year in 'year'
solution: const year = new Date().getFullYear();

title: Regex
starterCode: // Regex for only digits, test '12345'
solution:
const regex = /^\d+$/;
const result = regex.test('12345');
